ProjectsPage.description: Explore all my side-projects, open-source utilities and platform apps. Each project explores a unique technical challenge. Custom video showcases run on intent.

Home.name: Miroslav Novotny
Home.intro: IT student heading to CTU FIT with experience in full-stack development. I specialize in Next.js and Java (Spring Boot). I am also proficient in working with relational databases (SQL), Redis, and Linux administration.
Home.bio: Specializing in complex web applications within the React and Next.js ecosystem, with a focus on type safety and efficient infrastructure.
Home.about: Graduating May 2026 from Educanet Praha (IT focus) and admitted to FIT ČVUT (Computer Engineering). Active Arch Linux user btw🤓.

vyhledavac-adres.title: RÚIAN Address Search
vyhledavac-adres.description: Lighting fast local search engine for gigabytes of Czech real estate data. Entirely built in Rust with WebAssembly and Full-text indexes.
vyhledavac-adres.problem: Searching through massive RÚIAN data is slow and requires an online connection.
vyhledavac-adres.solution: Local Rust search engine with WASM that indexes GBs of data into a fast full-text search.

impostor.title: Simple Impostor Game
impostor.description: Modern PWA implementation of the social deduction party game. Built with React and Tailwind CSS featuring offline mode and smooth animations.
impostor.problem: Party games often require paper or expensive apps.
impostor.solution: Modern PWA in React that works offline on every mobile device.
impostor.impact: Tons of fun with friends without any installation needed.

fractal.title: Fractal Generator
fractal.description: University-level Rust project focused on high-performance rendering of the Barnsley fern fractal with real-time zooming capabilities.
fractal.problem: Rendering complex fractals in real-time is computationally expensive.
fractal.solution: Highly parallelized Rust code with efficient mathematical algorithms.
fractal.impact: Smooth zooming into infinite details without lag.

tree.title: Colorful Tree Utility
tree.description: A visually enhanced C-based directory tree viewer featuring colorful nerd font icons, syntax highlighting and smart folder recognition.
tree.problem: The standard tree utility is visually boring and hard to read.
tree.solution: Implementation in C with Nerd Font support and color coding.
tree.impact: Improved orientation in folder structures within the terminal.

flashscore.title: Flashscore Scraper
flashscore.description: Highly optimized Node.js microservice replacing a linear scraping script with an O(2) parallel execution system.
flashscore.problem: Linear data scraping is slow and inefficient.
flashscore.solution: O(2) asynchronous system in Node.js for parallel data collection.
flashscore.impact: Significant speedup in real-time data updates.
